name: zinput_mouse_recenter_cursor
description: zInput::Mouse_RecenterCursor moves cached mouse state to the client center, clears normalized coordinates, and applies the OS cursor position.
binary_safe_evidence: python tools/recoil_vc6_verify.py zinput_mouse_recenter_cursor passed for 0x470150 with VC5SP3 11.00.7022 /O2 /Ob0 /Zp4: 0 unmasked byte mismatches, 28 relocation-masked bytes, BN size 47, VC object size 48, 1 trailing VC NOP trimmed.
